query:
ALTER TABLE `fraud_alerts` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `fraud_detail` TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `discount_revoked` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `resolved_at` DATETIME;
